_comment: EDIT THIS FILE to update the site in one place. No code changes needed. After editing, just commit and push.
TAGLINE: A nationwide network of former defense attorneys.
HERO_HEADING: Find a former defender near you.
HERO_SUBTEXT: Select your state on the map to see the attorneys we recommend, or choose a star to view a specific office.
ABOUT_BODY: The Former Defenders Project is a referral initiative connecting people who need criminal defense counsel with experienced attorneys across the country. Every attorney listed has spent part of their career as a public defender or court-appointed counsel, defending the accused day in and day out. We maintain this map so you can find vetted, trial-tested representation in your state quickly and without guesswork.
FOOTER_DISCLAIMER: This website is a project of the sponsoring law firm and is intended for informational purposes only. The attorneys shown are recommendations and not a referral, guarantee, or endorsement of any particular outcome. Contacting an attorney through this site does not create an attorney-client relationship. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome.
